title: Lab 18: Tuned Recommended Profile
description: Apply the system recommended tuned profile.

tasks.title: Apply the recommended tuned profile and leave it
tasks.prompt: Apply the recommended tuned profile and leave it active after reboot.

hints: Use tuned-adm recommended to see the target profile.

checks.original_command: rec="$(tuned-adm recommended | awk '{print $1}')"; act="$(tuned-adm active | sed -E 's/.*: ([^ ]+).*/\1/')"; test -n "$rec" && test "$act" = "$rec"
checks.command: rec="$(tuned-adm recommended | awk '{print $1}')"; act="$(tuned-adm active | sed -E 's/.*: ([^ ]+).*/\1/')"; test -n "$rec" && test "$act" = "$rec"
